Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW INDIAN HEALTH CLINIC HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of general medical care, immunizations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, diabetes testing, sexually transmitted infections testing and treatment, breast cancer screening, tobacco cessation programs, addictions assessment and treatment, and Oregon Health Plan (OHP) eligibility assistance. 703 NE Hancock Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Native American or Alaskan Native or other vulnerable populations Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-7pm Email (503) 230-9875 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW WELLNESS CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of general medical care, immunizations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, diabetes testing, sexually transmitted infections testing and treatment, breast cancer screening, tobacco cessation programs, addictions assessment and treatment, and Oregon Health Plan (OHP) eligibility assistance. 12360 E Burnside Street 2nd Floor Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Native American or Alaskan Native or other vulnerable populations Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-7pm Email (971) 279-4800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST HEALTH SERVICES NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST HEALTH SERVICES
